author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Wave 1 complete: 11 agents delivered MNIST parsing, bmm, Conv1d/ConvTranspose2d, autocast, L-BFGS, EfficientNet, ConvNeXt, Swin, U-Net, VGG (already done earlier), image I/O. Remaining wave 2 items: #120 (YOLO), #121 (cuDNN), #122 (NCCL), #123 (Cranelift), #124 (graph breaks), #125 (memory planning), #126 (SafeTensors crate), #127 (PyTorch .pt import).
